description_long: This is a plush, dark brown leather recliner with a high backrest and generously padded armrests. The upholstery features visible stitching, adding a touch of detail and reinforcing the structure. The seat and backrest are segmented into multiple cushioned sections, providing ergonomic support for the head, back, and lumbar regions. The base is a circular, sturdy platform, likely made of metal or wood, designed to support the weight and allow for swiveling or reclining motion. The armrests are wide and well-cushioned, matching the overall luxurious appearance. The surface has a glossy finish, reflecting light and emphasizing the smoothness of the leather material.
description: A dark brown, glossy leather recliner with segmented cushioning, wide padded armrests, and a circular base. The upholstery features visible stitching and a plush, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the segmented backrest, wide padded armrests, and the deep, cushioned seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the reclined angle of the backrest, the thickness of the seat, and the circular base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back of the recliner and the rounded armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the plushness of the seat and the ergonomic curve of the backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, thickly padded, and upholstered in the same dark brown leather as the rest of the chair, with visible stitching along the edges for added detail.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into multiple cushioned sections, including a distinct headrest, upper back, and lumbar support areas, providing ergonomic comfort.
